name: Pot Hole Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the Polish sausage in a saucepan over medium heat until thoroughly cooked and browned on all sides.
2. Add the diced green pepper and onion to the sausage. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the vegetables are softened.
3. Drain any excess fat from the pan using a slotted spoon, leaving behind just enough oil to grease the muffin pans.
4. Grease the muffin pans with cooking spray or butter.
5. Spoon the mashed potatoes into each muffin cup, filling them about 2/3 full.
6. Scoop out the center of each potato mound and fill it with the sausage mixture.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes or until the potatoes are cooked through and lightly browned on top.
8. Serve hot from the oven.
